global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with promotional text and a call-to-action button.
global.main_message: Promoting a limited-time flash sale for LuxShelf products.

elements.label: LuxShelf logo
elements.description: A prominent logo featuring the text 'LuxShelf' in bold, modern typography, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Shop now button
elements.description: A rounded button with the text 'Shop now' in a clear, inviting font, located at the bottom center of the ad.

elements.label: Sale announcement
elements.description: Text stating 'Flash sale live' in a large, eye-catching font, conveying urgency and excitement.

elements.label: Weekend sale header
elements.description: A short header text that reads 'Only this weekend', designed to grab attention with a contrasting color.

elements.label: $4.99 price tag
elements.description: A bold price tag displaying '$4.99' prominently, emphasizing the affordability of the offer.
elements.text_content: Flash sale live Only this weekend $4.99 Shop now

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: A solid blue background that provides a vibrant and engaging backdrop for the text and elements.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, native, bright and modern, LuxShelf, flash sale, $4.99
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the sale announcement and weekend header, with the price at the bottom and the CTA centered.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: LuxShelf, Flash sale live, Only this weekend, $4.99, Shop now
